publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2025-08-15 23:59:12 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Publications, tape recordings, some correspondence, mainly clippings related to Tommy Gold and his research

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: The Thomas Gold papers (1954-1986) contains publications, tape recordings, correspondence, clippings, and photographs related to Tommy Gold and his research. The collection also contains reports and photographs related to the planning and construction of the Arecibo Observatory.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Thomas Gold (May 22, 1920-June 22, 2004) was an Austrian-born astrophysicist and professor of astronomy at Cornell University.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Thomas Gold papers, #14-7-4414. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Misc. Research Materials (notes, photos, letters, paper drafts)
Misc. Research Materials (book chapters, reports, photos, etc.)
Autonetics - A Circularly Polarized TM11 Mode Launcher for the Arecibo Line Source Feed
Autonetics - Cost Plus Fixed Fee Proposal for The Design and Development of a TM11 Mode Launcher
Autonetics 430 MHz feed development contract, documents
Autonetics - Scale Model of a 611 MHz Feed for the Arecibo Spherical Reflector A. W. Love, # T8-587/060
Autonetics - Scale Model Development of A Feed for the Arecibo Spherical Reflector at 611 MHz, A.W. Love, # 09-325/401
Autonetics - Arecibo 430 MHz Scale Model Feed Study, A.W. Love, #T9-651.1/401
Autonetics - Experimental Line Feed Development Program, A.W. Love, #T7-1194/401
Autonetics - Arecibo Scale Model Line Feed Design, Interim Technical Report A.W. Love, #T7-687/401
Space Sciencs Building Completion (Cornell Daily Sun)
Autonetics - Arecibo 430 MHz Feed Development Study (Annual Report) A.W. Love, #C70-112.1/301
Autonetics - Arecibo 430 MHz Feed Development Study (Annual Report) A.W. Love, #C70-112.2/301
Autonetics - Arecibo 430 MHz Feed Development Study A.W. Love, #C70-112.4/301
Autonetics - Arecibo 430 MHz Feed Development Study A.W. Love, #C70-112.5/301
Program Plan, Arecibo 430 MHz Feed Development Study
Autometics - Scale Model Development of a 430 MHz Circularly Polarized Line Feed for the Arecibo Reflector, A.W. Love, #T9-651/401
430 MHz Arecibo Feed Feed Development, Final Engineering Report A.W. Love, #C70-112.6/301
Arecibo Observatory "Information for Users" & assorted correspondence
Science Programs & AIO - pulsars, radar astronomy, etc.
Arecibo Evaluation Panel - Final & Last Report
ROHR Corportion: Engineering Summary for the Reflector Study for the 1000-Ft Diameter Radio Telescope.
Mason & McGuire Feasibility Study & Belcher First Survey
Donald Belcher short paper; Site Locations for Proposed Radio Telescope
Von Seb preliminary report (Kavanagh & Tung construction paper)
Photo: Institut International de Physique Solvay, Onzieme Conseil de Physique - Bruxelles

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photograph includes J.R. Oppenheimer, Wolfgang Pauli, Walter Baade.

did.unittitle: Photo: Tommy Gold in front of Space Sciences Bldg

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs of Wolfgang Pauli, Walter Baade; Ratio Club at Cambridge group photograph (includes Alan Turing, Ross Ashby, Albert Uttley, Horace Barlow)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs of Hermann Bondi, Margaret Burbirdge, Harold Urey, William Fowler; photograph of Carl Sagan and Gold at a Conference on the Surface of Mars, February, 1967.

did.unittitle: Photo: Gold - Pulsar issues; Rome Conference - Gold proposed pulsars were neutron stars

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs of Harry Messel, Hermann Bondi.

did.unittitle: Photos: Sydney University - Summer Lecture Series

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs of Hermann Bondi, Harry Messel, and George Gamow.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Committee to design and build Lunar close-up; stereo camera with Ed Land from Polaroid. Includes photographs of Steven Soter, Ralph Bolgiano, Jr.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs of Arecibo construction, David Van Winkle, Cyril Hazard.

did.unittitle: James Waller draft paper to W. Gordon on Radar Measurements of the properties the upper atmosphere
